testcase.name: Copywriting.tsx page structure > imports and uses CopywritingForm
Copywriting.tsx page structure > imports and uses CopywritingPreview
Copywriting.tsx page structure > imports and uses CopywritingHistory sidebar
Copywriting.tsx page structure > calls trpc.copywriting.freeGenerate.useMutation()
Copywriting.tsx page structure > uses useSearchParams for URL state (AC-6)
Copywriting.tsx page structure > implements localStorage draft key (AC-7)
Copywriting.tsx page structure > implements debounce for LS draft save (AC-7)
Copywriting.tsx page structure > sets isStreaming=true on mutation success
CopywritingForm component structure > renders topic textarea with data-testid
CopywritingForm component structure > renders 6 platform buttons
CopywritingForm component structure > imports SCRIPT_TYPE_LABELS from lib/constants/scripts
CopywritingForm component structure > renders elements checkbox group from HOT_ELEMENT_GROUPS
CopywritingForm component structure > renders submit button with ✨ 生成爆款文案
CopywritingForm component structure > validates topic minimum length (≥10 字)
StreamdownPreview component structure > renders ReactMarkdown with remark-gfm
StreamdownPreview component structure > accepts isStreaming prop and animates content
StreamdownPreview component structure > shows model meta chunk when modelName provided
CopywritingPreview component structure > uses lazy StreamdownPreview + Suspense (AC-9)
CopywritingPreview component structure > renders 复制全文 / 另存为模板 / 保存到历史 三按钮
CopywritingPreview component structure > renders error with color=error (AC-4)
CopywritingHistory component structure > queries trpc.history.list with agentId=CopywritingAgent
CopywritingHistory component structure > renders toggle button for collapse
lib/constants/scripts.ts > exports SCRIPT_TYPE_KEYS_20 and SCRIPT_TYPE_LABELS
copywritingFreeGenerateInput schema > passes with valid scriptType + elements + topic
copywritingFreeGenerateInput schema > fails when topic is too short (< 1 char)
copywritingFreeGenerateInput schema > fails when elements array is empty
copywritingFreeGenerateInput schema > fails when elements exceed 8 items
localStorage key utilities > draft key format is copywriting_draft_${userId}_${accountId}
localStorage key utilities > getToolLsKey produces correct aiip pattern
